message:
feat(gf256,bench): add environment-reproducibility metadata to profile-pack manifest and Track-E logs

Extend the GF(256) profile-pack manifest with compile-time environment
metadata so Track-E benchmark logs carry full reproducibility context.

gf256.rs:
- New Gf256ProfileEnvironmentMetadata struct capturing target_arch,
  target_os, target_env, target_endian, target_pointer_width_bits
  from std::env::consts and CARGO_CFG_TARGET_* variables with safe
  fallbacks
- Populate environment_metadata in gf256_profile_pack_manifest_snapshot()
- Extend manifest snapshot test to assert all five environment fields

benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs:
- Switch emit_track_e_policy_log and emit_track_e_policy_probe_log
  from dual_kernel_policy_snapshot() to gf256_profile_pack_manifest_snapshot()
- Extend JSON log format with manifest_schema_version, catalog counts,
  architecture class, all environment fields, and selected tuning
  candidate details (tile_bytes, unroll, prefetch_distance, fusion_shape)
- New selected_candidate_fields() helper for optional candidate extraction

Covers E5 slices 4 and 5 (manifest snapshot API + environment
reproducibility).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
